def negative_helper_requires_caller_to_know_hidden_ordering_constraints():
    rule_id = "helper_requires_caller_to_know_hidden_ordering_constraints"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag helpers whose correctness depends on the caller invoking them in a specific undocumented order."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
